query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A black and white image showing overlapping silhouettes of two human figures in an embrace, rendered with contour line patterns and smooth gradient surfaces against a soft background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract, surreal black and white composition depicting embracing figures dissolved into intentional blur and contour-line artifacts, with muted faded tones, mushy indistinct surfaces, and dreamlike overlapping forms that obscure representational clarity in favor of subconscious, distorted shapes.
